history.summary: The existing single product flow now renders the G2-G8 contract pipeline across desktop and mobile while preserving normal execution and legacy replay compatibility.
Traceable claim ledger, 12-chapter blocked-aware report and knowledge map now separate proposition type from evidence status while preserving old delivery contracts.
Six independent traceable module results now enforce source/raw/quote roles, evidence/sample axis coverage, isolation and module-specific inference guardrails.
Source-role / claim-role authorization now gates formal source, raw document, structured evidence, review and confirmed report delivery without loosening legacy evidence honesty checks.
Representative sampling engine completed with deterministic multi-axis selection, exclusions, analogy isolation and fail-closed official pool.
Source-role driven candidate planning completed with no-key adapter, quotas, compliance blocks and candidate/evidence separation.
Six-stage local execution, artifact, checkpoint, resume and idempotency contract completed without database or production state.
Skincare Planner calibrated with official China regulatory/statistical scope and explicit methodological guardrails.
Industry OS C2 基线与权威文档已固化；旧 benchmark 标签保留为历史证据。
